original_draft.goal: Capture a marketing brief through conversation, normalize it into structured JSON, and produce hook-heavy, platform-specific copy without fabricating facts.
success_criteria: Intake produces a raw_brief with product, ICP, and platforms
structured_brief matches schema and uses only provided facts
Multiple distinct hook angles, not trivial paraphrases
Requested platforms receive tailored copy with CTAs where apt
Honors tone, banned phrases, and no fabricated metrics
constraints: Do not invent customers, metrics, logos, or press quotes
Flag uncertain claims in verify_flags or notes, not as facts
normalize-brief and write-package must emit parseable JSON strings

nodes.name: Intake
nodes.description: Greets the user, gathers or clarifies the marketing brief, then outputs raw_brief for normalization.
nodes.success_criteria: The raw_brief captures product, audience, differentiation, optional proof, tone, banned phrases, and target platforms from the conversation.

nodes.name: Normalize brief
nodes.description: Normalizes raw_brief into fixed-schema structured_brief JSON.
nodes.success_criteria: structured_brief is valid JSON matching the required schema.

nodes.name: Write copy package
nodes.description: Produces hooks and per-channel copy from structured_brief.
nodes.success_criteria: copy_package is valid JSON with distinct hooks and content for requested platforms only.
